rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex block terminators
Preserve existing architecture when repairing AGREE syntax errors
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
Place implementation-level bindings in the implementation annex
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool for declarations
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
Implementation annexes are for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Do not add architecture to fix AGREE syntax errors
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use package-qualified identifiers in generated AGREE code
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics about named thing types
AGREE validator diagnostics about scalar type names
AGREE validator diagnostics about implementation scope guarantees
